Journal Article · Advanced Materials, 2308774

NIR-Activatable Heterostructured Nanoadjuvant CoP/NiCoP Executing Lactate Metabolism Interventions for Boosted Photocatalytic Hydrogen Therapy and Photoimmunotherapy

Chunzheng Yang, Jiashi Zhang, Mengyu Chang, Jia Tan, Meng Yuan, Yulong Bian, Bin Liu, Zhendong Liu, Meifang Wang, Binbin Ding, Ping'an Ma*, and Jun Lin*

DOI

Abstract

A NIR-activatable CoP/NiCoP heterostructured nanoadjuvant for lactate metabolism intervention, photocatalytic hydrogen therapy, and photoimmunotherapy.

Highlights

  • Combines lactate metabolism intervention with hydrogen therapy.
  • Uses a NIR-activatable heterostructured nanoadjuvant.

Add NIR activation and hydrogen therapy details here.

Citation

Chunzheng Yang et al. NIR-Activatable Heterostructured Nanoadjuvant CoP/NiCoP. Adv. Mater. 2023, 2308774.
